task_completion.description: NotificationHelper.kt is created with the required channel IDs and importance levels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an editor tab named `NotificationHelper.kt` containing channel IDs "note_reminders" with `IMPORTANCE_HIGH` (or equivalent integer) and "app_updates" with `IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT`, along with a method to create these channels.

task_completion.description: NotificationHelper.kt contains a method to build a reminder notification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a method named `buildReminderNotification` in `NotificationHelper.kt` that uses the reminders channel and sets the small icon to `android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info`.

task_completion.description: NotepadApplication.kt is created, extends Application, and initializes channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an editor tab named `NotepadApplication.kt` containing a class that extends `Application` (or `android.app.Application`) and overrides `onCreate()` to call the channel creation method from `NotificationHelper`.

task_completion.description: AndroidManifest.xml is updated with the required permission and application class registration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an editor tab named `AndroidManifest.xml` showing `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />` and the `android:name=".NotepadApplication"` attribute inside the `<application>` tag.
Look for the 'Build' tool window at the bottom of Android Studio showing 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' or a green checkmark, or a terminal showing a successful `./gradlew` build execution.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio or a proper code editor to write the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Android Studio IDE interface with the project structure and editor tabs visible, rather than just terminal text editors like nano or echo commands.

integrity.description: The visible code does not have obvious syntax errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the absence of red squiggly lines or red file names in the Android Studio editor, which would indicate unresolved references or syntax errors.
Look for authentic Gradle build output in the Android Studio Build tool window or terminal, rather than a manually typed 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotepadApp with package com.example.notepadapp. NotificationHelper.kt must be at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/notifications/NotificationHelper.kt and define channels 'note_reminders' (IMPORTANCE_HIGH) and 'app_updates' (IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT). NotepadApplication.kt must be at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/NotepadApplication.kt. AndroidManifest.xml must include android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS and register the custom Application class.
